command: $file = 'C:\Users\Revexn\CodeAnalyzer\code_analyzer.py'; $lines = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines($file, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8); Write-Output "Total lines: $($lines.Count)"; Write-Output "Line 82 before: $($lines[81])"; Write-Output "Line 83 before: $($lines[82])"; $lines[81] = $lines[81].TrimEnd() + $lines[82].TrimStart(); $newLines = [System.Collections.ArrayList]::new($lines); $newLines.RemoveAt(82); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllLines($file, $newLines.ToArray(), [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8); $verify = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines($file, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8); Write-Output "Line 82 after: $($verify[81])"; Write-Output 'Fix applied successfully!'
description: إصلاح خطأ SyntaxError في السطر 82 باستخدام PowerShell - دمج السطرين 82 و 83
